content:
1. Should students be able to unlock a secret character class (e.g., if they complete all extra credit or win the Mastery Exam)?

✔ Yes. If they achieve every possible XP goal, they unlock “The Omniscient One” – a character who gains access to ALL special abilities.

2. Should there be “faction-based” unlocks if enough students follow the same archetype path?

✔ Example: If 5+ students are Archivists, the whole faction unlocks an “Archivist’s Library” that gives research-based perks.

3. Should students be able to switch archetypes without losing XP if they provide a strong narrative justification?

✔ If they write a compelling 300-word narrative about why their character evolved, they can switch archetypes without penalty.

4. Do we want to have a final in-class event that ties into the class-wide XP achievements?

✔ Final Week: The Academic Tournament
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 58 (chunk 58/555)
